channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [续作] Anime News Network Vengeance, Sincerely, Your Broken Saintess 季度 2 Debuts on October 1
item.description: Cast members Tomoaki Maeno, Minami Tsuda, Reiō Tsuchida also confirmed to return ― The official website for the second light anime season based on SORAJIMA and Aminohada's With Vengeance, Sincerely,... | 来源: ANN | 原文: 'With Vengeance, Sincerely, Your Broken Saintess' Season 2 Debuts on October 1

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network Chainsmoker Cat 动画 Gets Uncut Evil Dragon Unleashed Version
item.description: Version that "respects the work's directorial intent" will be on AT-X, Netflix, AnimeFesta, DMM TV, FOD, Hulu, Anime Times ― The official website for the television anime of Nyan Nyan Factory's... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Chainsmoker Cat Anime Gets Uncut 'Evil Dragon Unleashed' Version
